Enum Class RestorationSimulator.DegradationType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<RestorationSimulator.DegradationType>
org.episteme.social.arts.RestorationSimulator.DegradationType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<RestorationSimulator.DegradationType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
RestorationSimulator
public static enum RestorationSimulator.DegradationType extends Enum<RestorationSimulator.DegradationType>
Common forms of chemical and physical degradation in fine art materials.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CANVAS_SAGGING
    Loss of tension in canvas support due to humidity cycling.
    DELAMINATION
    Separation of layers due to adhesive failure.
    FOXING
    Small reddish-brown spots on paper caused by metal oxidation.
    INSECT_DAMAGE
    Destruction of wood or canvas by larvae or termites.
    MOLD
    Biological growth on moist organic substrates.
    OXIDATION
    Chemical reaction with atmospheric pollutants.
    PAINT_CRACKING
    Mechanical stress leading to craquelure and paint loss.
    PIGMENT_FADING
    Photochemical degradation of organic dyes and pigments.
    VARNISH_YELLOWING
    Oxidation leading to yellowing of natural resin varnishes.
    WATER_DAMAGE
    Irreversible structural damage from aqueous exposure.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • VARNISH_YELLOWING

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType VARNISH_YELLOWING
      Oxidation leading to yellowing of natural resin varnishes.

    • PAINT_CRACKING

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType PAINT_CRACKING
      Mechanical stress leading to craquelure and paint loss.

    • CANVAS_SAGGING

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType CANVAS_SAGGING
      Loss of tension in canvas support due to humidity cycling.

    • PIGMENT_FADING

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType PIGMENT_FADING
      Photochemical degradation of organic dyes and pigments.

    • OXIDATION

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType OXIDATION
      Chemical reaction with atmospheric pollutants.

    • MOLD

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType MOLD
      Biological growth on moist organic substrates.

    • DELAMINATION

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType DELAMINATION
      Separation of layers due to adhesive failure.

    • FOXING

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType FOXING
      Small reddish-brown spots on paper caused by metal oxidation.

    • WATER_DAMAGE

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType WATER_DAMAGE
      Irreversible structural damage from aqueous exposure.

    • INSECT_DAMAGE

      public static final RestorationSimulator.DegradationType INSECT_DAMAGE
      Destruction of wood or canvas by larvae or termites.

    • valueOf

      public static RestorationSimulator.DegradationType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
